Should Saturn aspect Mars in Cancer, the native will acquire money through journey in water, be
equal to a king, be sportive in his acts and be always bright.
49-54. MARS IN LEO IN ASPECT TO OTHERS.
If Mars is in Leo and is aspected by the Sun, the native will be humble, helpful to friends, be
endowed with own men and be fond of wandering in cow-houses, forests and hills.
If the Moon aspects Mars in Leo, the native will be ominous for his mother, be intelligent, will
possess a hard body, be widely famous and will obtain money through women.
79

If Mercury aspects Mars in Leo, the native will be clever in many arts, be a miser, be skilful in
poetry and fine arts and be wicked.
If Jupiter aspects Mars in Leo, the person will be close to the king, be highly learned, be of pure
mentality and be an Army chief.
